description: Compute the flood hazard index for the Muncie reach using the HEC-RAS simulation results (HDF5 file) in the Muncie project directory. Extract the Hydraulic Depth and Channel Velocity for each cross section at the Peak Flow time step to calculate the Depth-Velocity (DV) Product (Depth × Velocity). Classify each cross section into hazard categories: Low (DV < 4), Medium (4 <= DV < 12), High (12 <= DV < 25), and Extreme (DV >= 25). Save a CSV report to /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/flood_hazard_index.csv with columns: river_station, depth_ft, velocity_fps, dv_product, and hazard_category. Additionally, save a summary text file to /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/flood_hazard_summary.txt containing the count of cross sections in each category and identifying the stations with the maximum and minimum DV products.
